chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.481 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.2905/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection and reply of advocate at flag “A” 3. For orders on M.A. No.2906/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 24.02.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Shah, advocate for applicants ------------------------------------------- Applicants/accused seeks protective bail in FIR No.52/2025, registered at P.S. City Jacobabad, for offence under section 506-B, 504, PPC. Counsel for applicants/ accused does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that the IO has recommended the disposal of aforesaid FIR in “B” class. In view of such statement, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E Gulsher/PS z
